summary: T1 latency-sensitive testing of B2B marketplace. Backend (auth, products CRUD with ownership, file upload+download, inquiries, threads, messages REST + WebSocket, admin endpoints) and frontend e2e (landing, admin login + stats, buyer login, browse, product detail, send inquiry, chat with message) all working. Found 4 minor backend issues (non-blocking) and 1 frontend a11y warning.
passed: POST /api/auth/register buyer (no company) and supplier (creates company, returns company_id)
POST /api/products as supplier creates product; product appears in GET /api/products with company info
GET /api/products/{id} returns product with company joined (Test Industries)
PUT /api/products/{id} updates fields for owner; buyer PUT returns 403
POST /api/upload as supplier returns {path,url}; GET /api/files/{path} returns 200
POST /api/inquiries by buyer creates inquiry + thread + initial message (thread_id returned)
GET /api/threads filtered by role (buyer sees own thread)
POST /api/threads/{id}/messages adds message (when thread_id provided in body)
Frontend: Landing hero loads, admin login redirects to /admin and shows stats
Frontend: Buyer login redirects to /buyer; Browse shows products
Frontend: ProductDetail Send Inquiry dialog creates thread and redirects to /chat/{id}
Frontend: Chat page renders previous messages (REST + WS messages visible)

failed.issue: Acts like full replace; fields not provided in body get reset to schema defaults (description='', category='General', moq=1) even though endpoint suggests partial update
failed.evidence: After PUT {price:199.99}, GET shows category='General', description='', moq=1

failed.issue: Response payload does not echo updated 'description' field (returned None in parsed body)
failed.evidence: curl PUT /api/companies/me with {description:'Updated by T1'} returns body where description is missing/None

failed.issue: MessageIn Pydantic model requires thread_id in BODY even though it is already in path. REST clients must duplicate it (frontend already does, but API is awkward and 422 if omitted)
failed.evidence: POST with only {body} returns 422 'Field required: thread_id'. server.py:174-176
Console warning on opening inquiry dialog

action_items: Optional: Make PUT /api/products/{id} a true partial update (exclude_unset) so non-provided fields are not reset.
Optional: Remove thread_id requirement from MessageIn body since it's a path param, or keep but make optional.
Optional: Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to inquiry dialog to clear a11y warning.
